CheckTitle: RDS インスタンスs enforce SSL/TLS 暗号化 for client connections (Microsoft SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, Aurora PostgreSQL, and Aurora MySQL).をチェックします
Description: For SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and Aurora PostgreSQL データベースs, if the `rds.force_ssl` parameter valueが設定されています to 0, SSL/TLS connections are not enforced. For MySQL, Aurora MySQL, and MariaDB データベースs, if the `require_secure_transport` parameter valueが設定されています to OFF, SSL/TLS connections are not enforced. Enforcing SSL/TLS ensures that all client connections to RDS インスタンスs are 暗号化済み, protecting sensitive information in transit.
Risk: If not enabled, sensitive information in transit is not protected.

Recommendation.Text: instances provisioned with Amazon RDS enforce SSL/TLS for client connections to meet security and compliance requirements.を確認します
